name: archangl-plugin-marketplace
description: archangl's personal Claude Code plugin collection.

plugins.name: archangl-search
plugins.description: Multi-source research orchestrator that routes through the Exa and Firecrawl provider skills. Depends on both (auto-installed from this marketplace).

plugins.name: exa
plugins.description: Vendored snapshot of the Exa plugin: hosted Exa MCP server plus the search and agent research skills.

plugins.name: firecrawl-workflows
plugins.description: Vendored snapshot of Firecrawl Workflows: 16 outcome-focused Firecrawl skills for research, SEO, QA, knowledge bases, and more.
